subject: Steps Web/PWA v19h packaging successor
rights_scope: Private research and testing only; this evidence does not authorize publication.
scope: Web package containment, offline-shell behavior, exact 1024-square target declaration, and active nested-path layout. No gameplay, semantic-art, or compatibility-state change is claimed.
checks: package manifest and every checksummed artifact verified
nested package assets loaded without escaping the package directory
service-worker install, offline navigation, failure, traversal, and sibling-cache behavior covered by executable tests
exact 1024x1024 target profile rejects near-square alternatives
approved replay bytes and replay semantics are unchanged

human_review.reason: The user-approved semantic presentation and canonical replay are retained; v19h changes only generic package-path, service-worker, target-profile, and player-layout infrastructure.
